title: Kafka Record
description: Schema for an Apache Kafka record (message) including key, value, headers, and metadata.

topic.description: The topic the record belongs to

offset.description: The offset of the record within the partition

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the record in milliseconds since epoch

key.description: The record key, used for partitioning. Can be any type.

value.description: The record value (message payload). Can be any type.
